content.en:
With the protection of the Cloud Purple Goddess, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about anything else, but he wouldn't put all his mind on the Great God Arithmetic, so he would still leave some of his mind to pay attention to the surroundings.

In case the Cloud Purple Goddess is unreliable, he will also be able to protect himself in time.

The heart of defense is indispensable, he will not be stupid enough to fully trust the Yunzi Divine Maiden.

After crossing some more areas, Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden finally came to the core area of the forbidden land, which was a mountain full of invisible killing machines.

"Yunzi Priestess, your destination is this mountain, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded.

"Yunzi Divine Maiden, it's almost here, you should tell me why you're here, right?" Ye Tian said curiously.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden hesitated for a moment, but still said it, and said: "There is ice-free fire here, I have cultivated a special physique, and now I am only one step away from becoming a great achievement, and ice-free fire is a necessary thing, but it is a pity that there is almost no ice-free fire in the chaos, only this great universe has it." That's why I was among the first to enter the Great-Universe. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian said in a low voice.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the ice-free fire is on it, I can promise that except for the ice-free fire, everything else - the fate will be yours!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden assured.

"Really?"

Ye Tian's expression moved, and he said.

He is very poor now, he is indeed relatively rich compared to ordinary god generals, but compared to the Heavenly Monarch, he is poor, and even compared to gods like Yun Zi Divine Maiden, he is very poor.

This forbidden place is very extraordinary, even if the iceless fire is the most precious, but in addition to the iceless fire, there should be a lot of other treasures, enough to make his net worth skyrocket.

"Nature is true!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said with a smile.

She only needs ice-free fire, once she has ice-free fire, her strength will skyrocket in a short period of time, as for other treasures, she doesn't care about them.

With her status, it is not difficult to find treasures.

Not to mention her Dao Ancestor Master, her parents are also true ancestors, and their status is so high.

Therefore, she has a high vision, and she does not think that there is anything precious here except for fire without ice.

Besides, ice-free fire is not precious, it is just rare, it is of great use to her, but it is useless to others.

"Wanfa Daozi, where should we get in?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden asked.

"Wait until I do the math!"

Ye Tiandao.

Soon, Ye Tian used the Great God Arithmetic to deduce the entrance to enter.

"After three years, there is only this way to enter from this place, otherwise you will definitely die!"

Ye Tian said.

He didn't deceive the Yunzi Divine Maiden, but told the truth, the killing array here was too terrifying, Ye Tian thought that he couldn't break in, and it was useless to increase his strength a hundred times or a thousand times, and he couldn't compete with the killing array here.

Therefore, it is necessary to wait three years to quickly shuttle into the interior of the mountain from the only vital entrance.

"Good!"

The Cloud Purple Priestess agreed.

It's only been three years, and she can wait.

In the blink of an eye, three years have passed.

Swish!

Ye Tian took the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden and shuttled through a weak place in the killing array in an instant, but even so, Ye Tian and the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden were still seriously injured.

The Cloud Purple Goddess's Great Ice Realm Technique was shattered by the attack of the Killing Array, and its methods were also pierced one by one.

And although Ye Tian did not expose the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power and the Time and Space Movement Technique, many methods were also used one by one, but he still relied on the Great Immortal Technique to quickly recover from his injuries.

......

Inside the peaks.

It's like a world, and there's no danger.

Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden stayed here to recover from their injuries, and soon after, the two of them completely recovered.

"Wanfa Daozi, there's no danger here, right?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden asked.

"It's gone!"

Ye Tiandao.

He had already deduced it with the Great God Arithmetic, and there was absolutely no danger here.

Wow!

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden's body moved, flying in a certain direction, and she had already sensed the breath of iceless fire.

Ye Tian was also a little interested in the iceless fire, so he went over to take a look.

In the blink of an eye, the two of them came to the ice-free fire.

"So this is Fire Without Ice!"

Ye Tian looked at a flame above a lake in front of him, and was secretly surprised.

Importantly, beneath the flames was ice.

Above the ice, the flames took root in the void, such visions were rare.

The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden flew over and took out a treasure lotus to collect this ice-free fire.

However, a force burst out, and half of Yun Zi Divine Maiden's body was frozen.

But in the end, the Cloud Purple Priestess still succeeded in collecting the ice-free fire.

"It worked!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden was excited, which meant that she was able to cultivate that special physique to a great level, and her strength would skyrocket, maybe it wouldn't be long before he was expected to be among the eight-star god generals.

Seeing that the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden had successfully collected the Iceless Fire, Ye Tian said, "The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden, I'll go around and see if there are any treasures." "

·· Asking for flowers...

"Okay!" Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded, but after thinking about it, she said again: "I'll come with you, here, I can't retreat and cultivate." "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed, and took the Yunzi Divine Maiden with him.

In the following days, Ye Tian collected resources here.

This place is worthy of being the center of the forbidden land, and the resources are very rich, and some resources are even enough to make the Heavenly Monarch excited.

In just half a year, Ye Tian's harvest has at least 1,000 coins.

However, Ye Tian's biggest gain was not these ordinary resources.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian came to a valley, and there was a rock inside the valley with a black glow on it.

After Ye Tian smashed the rock, he saw a black metal, its texture was very hard, even if Ye Tian's attack fell on it, it only left a slight mark.

0...........

"Obsidian!"

When the Yun Zi Divine Maiden saw this metal, she was shocked and even moved.

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden, is this metal obsidian?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Yun Zi Priestess introduced: "Obsidian is a very precious metal in Chaos, and even many Chaos Arcana uses Obsidian, if there is enough Obsidian, it can even forge a half-way weapon. "

"What, this thing can forge a half-way?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Just because he doesn't know about obsidian doesn't mean he doesn't know about half-way.

In the midst of chaos, the half-way weapon is a weapon that surpasses the chaos treasure, and the dao weapon is a supreme weapon that can be refined and used by the Dao Ancestor, and the True Ancestor basically uses the half-Dao weapon, but some True Ancestors who are very poorly mixed don't even have a half-Dao weapon.

One can imagine how high the value of this obsidian is.

"Cloud Purple Priestess, you said that except for the fire without ice, any harvest here belongs to me, right?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"That's right!" the Yun Zi Divine Maiden looked remorseful.

I knew that there was an obsidian gold vein here, how could she agree to such a condition!

"Master, why didn't you tell me that there was obsidian here?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said secretly.

Her master can calculate that there is no ice and fire here, and she should also calculate that there is obsidian here.

But if you think about it carefully, obsidian is just garbage in the eyes of her master, so she naturally won't take the initiative to tell her.

"It's a loss!"

The Yunzi Divine Maiden had no choice but to think of the knife. _
